job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELMid-Senior levelEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONEngineering and Information TechnologyINDUSTRIESSoftware Development
job_description: About MoznMozn is a rapidly growing technology firm revolutionising the field ofArtificial Intelligence and Data Science headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabiaand it's working to realise Vision 2030 with a proven track record of excellencein supporting and growing the tech ecosystem in Saudi Arabia and the GCC region.Mozn is the trusted AI technology partner for some of the largest governmentorganizations, as well as many large corporations and startups.We are in an exciting stage of scaling the company to provide AI-poweredproducts and solutions both locally and globally that ensure the growth andprosperity of our digital humanity. It is an exciting time to work in the fieldof AI to create a long-lasting impact.About The RoleWe are seeking a high-performance Engineering Manager with proven experience tolead a brand new Agentic AI Squad of Engineers/data scientists building AgenticAI capabilites at the core of all our tools.What You'll DoAs an Engineering Manager, your daily workload might include: * Hire, lead, mentor, and manage the best in class group of product Engineers, to build the best in class products within the Anti Money Laundering /Anti-Fraud space, cultivating collaboration and innovation. * Provide guidance, conduct performance reviews, and support career development for engineers. * Oversee the design, development, testing, and deployment of our SaaS product, with Agentic AI front and centre, ensuring timely delivery and high-quality standards. * Collaborate with other stakeholders to create engineering objectives for your team that align with business goals. * Work closely with product teams to help steer both the functional and technical roadmap with focus on the end user * Drive scalable architecture and design solutions, ensuring performance, reliability, and maintainability of the SaaS product. * Ensure best practices for coding, security, testing, and performance optimisation are followed. * Stay updated with domain trends, technologies, promote its adoption across the tech stack and development process to drive innovation and efficiency * Develop and implement policies, standards, and procedures for your engineering team that empowers them to be high performing. Qualifications * BS/MS from a top school in Computer Science or any related field. * 12+ years of software engineering experience, of which 5+ years managing teams, preferable B2B SaaS software. * Proven track record of managing and scaling cross functional engineering teams at speed * Proven experience of creating a culture of data driven decision making * Proven experience in collaborating in an organisational unit of several independent engineering teams. * Excellent communication, leadership, and organizational skills. * Proven expertise in architecting and managing large-scale, complex distributed software systems. * Previous experience in AML or Fraud or Banking (Nice to have). * Experience with LLM orchestration frameworks, multi-agent architectures, or conversational AI pipelines. (Nice to have) BenefitsWe think you'll enjoy working at Mozn. Here's why: * You will be at the forefront of an exciting time for the Middle East, joining a high-growth rocket-ship in an exciting space. * You will be given a lot of responsibility and trust. We believe that the best results come when the people responsible for a function are given the freedom to do what they think is best. * The fundamentals will be taken care of: competitive compensation, top-tier health insurance, and an enabling culture so that you can focus on what you do best. * You will enjoy a fun and dynamic workplace working alongside some of the greatest minds in AI. * We believe strength lies in difference, embracing all for who they are and empowered to be the best version of themselves.Show more Show less
location: Riyadh, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia 57 minutes ago
title: Engineering Manager for Agentic AI

job_description: Aramco energizes the world economy.Aramco occupies a special position in the global energy industry. We are one ofthe world's largest producers of hydrocarbon energy and chemicals, with amongthe lowest Upstream carbon intensities of any major producer.With our significant investment in technology and infrastructure, we strive tomaximize the value of the energy we produce for the world along with acommitment to enhance Aramco's value to society.Headquartered in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and with offices around the world,we combine market discipline with a generations' spanning view of the future,born of our nine decades experience as responsible stewards of the Kingdom'svast hydrocarbon resources. This responsibility has driven us to deliversignificant societal and economic benefits to not just the Kingdom, but also toa vast number of communities, economies, and countries that rely on the vitaland reliable energy that we supply.We are one of the most profitable companies in the world, as well as amongst thetop five global companies by market capitalization.OverviewEngineering Services are seeking a Solution Architect with hands-on expertise indata engineering and solution architecture. This position bridges the gapbetween high-level business requirements and technical execution, defining thearchitecture of scalable data pipelines, robust storage solutions, andhigh-performance analytics environments. The responsibilities includeprototyping complex integrations and ensuring that data infrastructure isrobust, secure, resilient, and optimized for scale-up. As a practitioner in thisrole, the Solution Architect will be responsible for translating business needsinto technical solutions, leveraging your expertise to drive the design andimplementation of data-driven systems.Key ResponsibilitiesArchitectural Design: Lead the design of end-to-end solution and dataarchitectures, including ingestion, processing, storage, and visualizationlayers.Infrastructure Strategy: Define cloud-native or hybrid infrastructure strategiesthat support high-volume data processing and real-time analytics.Hands-on Development: Develop Proof of Concepts (PoCs) and core frameworkcomponents for data pipelines (e.g. ETL) to ensure architectural feasibility.Database Governance: Evaluate and select appropriate data stores (Relational,NoSQL, Graph, Vector) based on specific use-case requirements like latency,throughput, and consistency.Performance Optimization: Audit existing data systems to identify bottlenecksand implement strategies for cost-optimization and query performance tuning.Technical Leadership: Provide technical leadership in ensuring best practices invarious areas including CI/CD and documentation.Solution Architecture: Develop and maintain a deep understanding of thecorporate's technology landscape, including applications, data flows, andinfrastructure, to identify opportunities for improvement and optimization.Legacy Modernization: Experience migrating on-premise infrastructure tocloud-native architectures.Containerization: Experience with Docker and Kubernetes for deploying dataservices.Cloud Infrastructure: Expert-level experience with at least one major cloudprovider (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and their native data services.Data Processing: Strong proficiency in batch and stream processing.Programming: Advanced coding skills in Python, or Java, along with expert-levelSQL.Database Systems: Extensive experience managing and querying various systems:Relational: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, NoSQL/NewSQL: MongoDB, Cassandra,Warehousing/Lakehouses: Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery.Enterprise Architecture: Knowledge of enterprise architecture principles,including business architecture, information architecture, and technologyarchitecture.Minimum RequirementsBachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering,Information Systems, or a related field.Minimum of 8-10 years in IT, with at least 4 years in a Solution Architect orLead Data Engineer role.Proven track record of delivering at least two large-scale enterprise dataplatform migrations or greenfield builds.Preferred qualifications and experience: The certifications are TOGAF, ITIL, orsimilar.AI/ML Integration experience architecting Feature Stores and MLOpspipelines to support machine learning workflows.Governance Tools familiaritywith data cataloging and governance tools.Work Location and Work ScheduleWork Location: Within Saudi Arabia - To be specified in Job offerWork Schedule: Full Time - To be specified in Job offerWorking environmentOur high-performing employees are drawn by the challenging and rewardingprofessional, technical and industrial opportunities we offer, and areremunerated accordingly.At Aramco, our people work on truly world-scale projects, supported byinvestment in capital and technology that is second to none. And because, as aglobal energy company, we are faced with addressing some of the world's biggesttechnical, logistical and environmental challenges, we invest heavily in talentdevelopment.We have a proud history of educating and training our workforce over manydecades. Employees at all levels are encouraged to improve their sector-specificknowledge and competencies through our workforce development programs - one ofthe largest in the world.Country/Region: SAShow more Show less

job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELMid-Senior levelEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONEducation and TrainingINDUSTRIESEducation Administration Programs
job_description: Role Overview :The Dean (Academics) will serve as the chief academic officer for BIG AcademySaudi Arabia. This role requires a visionary leader with a deep background inComputer Science, AI, and Machine Learning to bridge the gap between advancedtechnical education and academic administration. The Dean will oversee theentire academic lifecycle—from curriculum design aligned with UK qualificationsto faculty management and student success—ensuring the Academy meetsinternational standards and contributes to Saudi VisionKey Result Areas (KRAs) & Key Performance Indicators:1: Academic Strategy & Curriculum Development Lead the design and evolution ofthe Academy’s academic programs, ensuring they remain industry-relevant andaligned with international accreditation. Responsibilities: • Spearhead thedevelopment of cutting-edge curricula in AI, ML, and Computer Science. • Ensureall programs align with UK Qualification frameworks (e.g., RQF, QAA) and localSaudi accreditation standards (NCAAA/TVTC). • Integrate industry-standard toolsand methodologies into the syllabus.KRA 2: Faculty Management & Development Build and sustain a high-performingacademic team capable of delivering world-class technical education.Responsibilities: • Recruit, onboard, and mentor top-tier faculty members anddepartment heads. • Implement a rigorous performance appraisal system forteaching staff. • Organize professional development workshops, focusing onpedagogical advancements in tech education.KRA 3: Quality Assurance & Accreditation Maintain the highest standards ofacademic integrity and operational excellence. Responsibilities: • Establish anInternal Quality Assurance Cell (IQAC) to monitor academic delivery. • Managerelationships with UK partner universities or awarding bodies. • Oversee thecreation of high-quality learning content (LMS materials, lab manuals, casestudies).KRA 4: Student Success & Learning Outcomes Ensure students achieve theirlearning goals and are prepared for the global workforce. Responsibilities: •Monitor student progression, retention, and graduation rates. • Implementintervention strategies for at-risk students. • Oversee final year capstoneprojects, ensuring they tackle real-world AI/ML problems.KRA 5: Research & Industry Partnerships Position BIG Academy as a thought leaderin the AI/ML space within the Kingdom. Responsibilities: • Forge partnershipswith tech giants and local industry leaders for internships and joint research.• Encourage faculty and student publication in reputable journals. • Representthe Academy at conferences and academic forums.Education:Essential: PhD in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning,or a closely related field from a reputable university.Experience:• Minimum 10 years of total academic experience. • Must have served as a Head ofDepartment (HoD), Dean, or Principal for at least 3-5 years. • Proven trackrecord in Curriculum Development and Content Creation for technical subjects.Skills & Competencies: UK Education System: Deep understanding of UK HigherEducation standards, credit frameworks, and quality assurance processes (e.g.,Pearson BTEC, British University partnerships). Leadership: Strong teammanagement skills with the ability to lead a diverse, multicultural faculty.Technical Proficiency: Ability to evaluate code, technical projects, and AImodels to ensure teaching quality remains high. Adaptability: Willingness torelocate to Saudi Arabia and adapt to the local culture and regulatoryenvironment. 4. Behavioral Competencies Strategic Vision: Ability to foreseeed-tech trends and pivot the academy's focus accordingly. Cultural Intelligence:Sensitivity to the cultural nuances of working in the Middle East. Decisiveness:Ability to make tough administrative decisions regarding budget, personnel, andpolicy. Show more Show less
title: Dean - Academics

job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELMid-Senior levelEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONEngineering and Information TechnologyINDUSTRIESIT System Custom Software Development
job_description: Role Brief – Data Architect (Analytics, AI & Platform Governance)Department: Data & Platform EngineeringReports to: VP of DataLocation: Hybrid / RiyadhWhy This Role ExistsWe are scaling rapidly — expanding products, customers, and acquisitions acrossglobal construction markets. Data is now the core connective layer (“DarkMatter”) that must keep pace with this growth.This role exists to design, and lead enterprise data architecture, ensuring: * One trusted source of truth for metrics * Customer-grade embedded analytics at scale * AI-driven insights built only on governed data * Fast onboarding of new products, data sources, and acquisitions MissionDesign and operate a best-of-breed, Microsoft-native analytics and AI platformthat delivers: * Reliable ingestion and open lake storage * Centralized governance and lineage * A single semantic layer reused across BI, embedded analytics, and AI * Scalable, secure, multi-tenant customer reporting * AI summaries, narratives, and future copilots powered by trusted data Platform Ownership (Future State)The Data Architect Owns And Evolves The Following ArchitectureSources → ADF → ADLS Gen2 (Delta) → Databricks (Silver/Curated, Unity Catalog) →Snowflake / Microsoft Fabric Compute (Power BI) → Power BI Semantic Models →Embedded & Internal ConsumptionKey Principles * Databricks + Unity Catalog as the governance and curation control plane * AI Powered migration strategies from the current SQL Server Datawarehouse * Power BI Semantic Models as the single metrics and security layer * Microsoft Fabric Compute (Power BI context only) for AI summaries, narratives, and LLM-based assistants * Power BI Embedded for all customer-facing analytics * Clear separation of customer workloads from internal experimentation Core Responsibilities * Own end-to-end data architecture, standards, and roadmap * Govern curated data using Databricks Unity Catalog (access, lineage, audit) * Define and maintain Power BI Semantic Models as the single source of truth * Enable AI-assisted insights, summaries, and story-based reporting * Architect secure, scalable, multi-tenant embedded analytics * Partner with product, engineering, and construction ops to translate business needs into durable data models * Produce clear ERDs, semantic documentation, and platform design artifacts Who We’re Looking For * Senior-level Data Architect or Analytics Architect * Strong Databricks experience (Delta Lake, Spark, Unity Catalog) * Deep understanding of Power BI (semantic models, embedded, security) * Solid coding background (Python, SQL; Scala a plus) * Comfortable enabling AI / agentic analytics on governed data * Experience with high-concurrency customer analytics and multi-tenancy Added ValueExperience with construction, industrial IoT, or workforce/safety data domains.What Success Looks Like * One trusted semantic model powering all analytics and AI * Customer dashboards that scale independently and securely * AI-generated insights embedded directly into executive and customer reports * Fast, low-friction onboarding of new data sources and acquisitions * Clear governance, lineage, and documentation adopted across teams Why It MattersThis role defines how we scale with confidence — ensuring data, metrics, and AIremain consistent, explainable, and trusted as the company grows acrossprojects, geographies, and products.Show more Show less
title: Data Architect

extracted_jd.title: Data Architect
responsibilities: Own end-to-end data architecture, standards, and roadmap
Govern curated data using Databricks Unity Catalog (access, lineage, audit)
Define and maintain Power BI Semantic Models as the single source of truth
Enable AI-assisted insights, summaries, and story-based reporting
Architect secure, scalable, multi-tenant embedded analytics
Partner with product, engineering, and construction ops to translate business needs into durable data models
Produce clear ERDs, semantic documentation, and platform design artifacts
Design and operate Microsoft-native analytics and AI platform
Lead AI-powered migration strategies from SQL Server Data Warehouse

Strong Databricks experience (Delta Lake, Spark, Unity Catalog)
Deep understanding of Power BI (semantic models, embedded, security)

Multi-tenant customer reporting lacks scalability and security

ideal_candidate_profile.identity_statement: A senior data architect who thrives on designing enterprise-scale, governed data platforms that serve as the 'DarkMatter' connecting rapidly growing business operations. This person builds trusted semantic layers that power both human decision-making and AI-driven insights while ensuring scalability across acquisitions, products, and geographies.
key_traits: Platform ownership mentality with end-to-end accountability
Governance-first approach to enabling AI on trusted data
Business translator who converts stakeholder needs into durable data models
Multi-tenant architecture expertise for customer-grade analytics at scale
Microsoft-native ecosystem fluency with Databricks as governance control plane
ideal_candidate_profile.experience_profile: Senior Data Architect or Analytics Architect with strong Databricks and Power BI platform experience
culture_signals: Trust and explainability as core values

job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELMid-Senior levelEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONBusiness Development and SalesINDUSTRIESSoftware Development
job_description: Our CompanyChanging the world through digital experiences is what Adobe’s all about. Wegive everyone—from emerging artists to global brands—everything they need todesign and deliver exceptional digital experiences! We’re passionate aboutempowering people to create beautiful and powerful images, videos, and apps, andtransform how companies interact with customers across every screen.We’re on a mission to hire the very best and are committed to creatingexceptional employee experiences where everyone is respected and has access toequal opportunity. We realize that new ideas can come from everywhere in theorganization, and we know the next big idea could be yours!Location: KAFD, Riyadh Hours of work: 40 hours per week Education requirement: Degree or equivalent qualification/experience Experience requirement: Minimum 5 years in SaaS solution environment Benefits: Private medical insurance; Employee stock purchase plan; Holiday &global well-being days; Allowances plus many more. Application start and end date: Starting 5th of January, for approx. 4-6weeks. Adobe Middle East Adobe in the Middle East empowers businesses and individuals through creativityand digital transformation. In Saudi Arabia, we support Vision 2030 by drivinginnovation, developing local talent, and enabling exceptional customerexperiences. As the regional headquarters for foreign companies, Adobe serves asa strategic hub for growth and collaboration across markets. Join us to helpshape the future of digital experiences in one of the world’s most dynamic(edited)The OpportunityCollaborate with global brands and agencies to revolutionize creative workflowswith AI-powered content services.Our approach emphasizes AI-first experimentation and extensive expertise infirst-party and third-party AI models to develop new applications, platforms,and scalable patterns that optimize the GenAI-powered Content Supply Chain. Weact as a continuous product innovation engine by incorporating customersolutions into the product roadmap for accelerated product-led growth.As an AI Engagement Manager, you excel at guiding customer interactions,detailing business scenarios, aligning them with Adobe solutions, andaccelerating value delivery.What You'll Do:Customer Leadership: * Lead large-scale creative and marketing operations transformations by harnessing Adobe's Generative AI solutions to drive organizational evolution. * Develop strong partnerships with essential customer partners through showcasing profound knowledge in innovative Al solutions and digital tactics tailored to the customer's business and goals. * Proactively handle customer issues and challenges, developing mitigation strategies before they impact project success or customer happiness * Build trust, confidence, and advocacy for the project/program team * Build executive communication cadences that showcase progress and value, and maintain enthusiasm for GenAI transformation efforts within a governance framework Product Leadership: * Formulate inclusive GenAI and digital transformation strategies utilizing Adobe's generative Al technologies/first-party models and third-party models to address intricate business obstacles for enterprise customers * Collaborate with customer executives to define use cases, build requirements and specifications for Forward Deployed Engineers and Architects, lead solution configuration and deployment, drive adoption, and ensure business value realization * Lead workshops and sessions to help customers identify impactful opportunities for implementing generative AI * Build scalable frameworks that integrate generative AI capabilities into customers’ existing technology ecosystems and workflows * Develop proof-of-concept implementations showcasing the transformative potential of both first-party and third-party AI offerings Value Realization and Adoption: * Partner with C-suite executives to articulate vision, establish success metrics, and secure ongoing dedication for transformation initiatives * Monitor implementation progress against business goals, adjusting strategies to overcome adoption barriers and improve value realization * Drive solution adoption through enablement sessions and demonstrations. Partner with Customer Success Managers and Enablement resources for comprehensive plans What You Bring * 4-10+ years of background in business consulting, digital strategy, agile pod-based software development lifecycle, enterprise software, AI/ML, cloud deployments, and data integration * Customer-Centricity: Always prioritizing the customer and their needs and expectations first in everything you do. You are exceptional at crafting a culture of customer-centricity among your team and your extended ecosystem. * Proven track record of leading successful digital transformation initiatives for enterprise clients in multiple industries * Have a product & human-centric approach – be the intersection among business, strategy, compose, and technology * Passion for AI and understanding of Adobe Creative Cloud, Express, Firefly, Firefly Services solutions, and GenStudio for Performance Marketing for the creation of content * Knowledge of Adobe Experience Cloud solutions preferred * Prior experience as Director of Creative Studio, Operations or Agency is a plus * Experience leading projects in Agile Scrum and commanding knowledge of various project and process applications (i.e., SharePoint, Jira, Workfront, Miro, Confluence, AI tools) * Ability to be adaptable and flexible as a product offering and GTM evolves * Outstanding communication skills with the ability to translate technical concepts into business outcomes for executive audiences * Strong analytical thinking with experience in quantifying business impact of technology investments * Proven skill in maneuvering through complex organizational dynamics and building consensus among diverse customers * Up to 30% customer related travel As our many awards will tell you, at Adobe you’ll be immersed in an exceptionalwork environment that is recognized around the world. You’ll be surrounded bycolleagues who are committed to helping each other grow through our uniqueCheck-In approach where ongoing feedback flows freely. If you’re looking to makean impact, Adobe's the place for you. Discover what our employees are sayingabout their career experiences on the Adobe Life blog,https://blog.adobe.com/en/topics/adobe-life and explore the fantastic benefitswe offer at Rewards.adobe.com.Adobe is an equal opportunity employer. job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELMid-Senior levelEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONInformation TechnologyINDUSTRIESIT Services and IT Consulting
job_description: Job TitleGCP Technical Architect – Pre-Sales (Cloud & Data Engineering)LocationAPMEAExperience10–16 years (Cloud, Data Platforms, and Customer-Facing Architecture)Role OverviewThe GCP Technical Architect – Pre-Sales (Cloud & Data Engineering) ownsend-to-end solution architecture, data platform design, and technical strategyduring the sales lifecycle. The role partners with Sales, Business Development,Google teams, and Delivery to craft secure, scalable, and cost-optimized cloudand data architectures on Google Cloud, helping customers modernize applicationsand unlock value from data.This role is critical in positioning cloud-native data platforms, analytics, andAI-ready architectures while ensuring commercial viability and deliveryreadiness.Key ResponsibilitiesPre-Sales & Customer Engagement * Own technical discovery, architecture definition, and solution storytelling for cloud and data-led deals * Translate business use cases into GCP-based cloud and data architectures * Engage with CXOs, Chief Data Officers, Architects, and Engineering leaders * Lead RFP/RFI responses covering cloud infrastructure, data platforms, and analytics * Deliver technical presentations, demos, and PoCs for cloud modernization and data engineering use casesCloud & Data Solution ArchitectureCloud Platform Architecture * Design end-to-end GCP architectures across: * Compute: GCE, GKE, Cloud Run, App Engine * Networking: VPCs, Shared VPC, Interconnect, VPN, Load Balancing * Security: IAM, KMS, Secret Manager, VPC-SC, Security Command Center * Architect hybrid and multi-cloud solutions (on-prem ↔ GCP, AWS/Azure ↔ GCP) * Apply Well-Architected Framework principles across security, reliability, performance, cost, and operationsData Engineering & Analytics Architecture * Design modern data platforms on GCP, including: * Data ingestion & streaming: Pub/Sub, Dataflow, Dataproc * Data lakes & storage: Cloud Storage, BigLake * Data warehousing & analytics: BigQuery * Operational databases: Cloud SQL, Spanner, Firestore, Bigtable * Architect batch and real-time data pipelines with scalability, reliability, and governance in mind * Define data modeling, partitioning, clustering, and performance optimization strategies in BigQuery * Design data governance, security, and lineage using IAM, DLP, Dataplex, and cataloging capabilities * Enable AI/ML-ready data architectures for downstream analytics, BI, and machine learning workloadsCost, FinOps & Commercial Support * Build TCO, ROI, and cost models for cloud infrastructure and data platforms * Advise on FinOps practices for BigQuery, Dataflow, storage tiers, and streaming workloads * Optimize architectures for performance vs. cost trade-offs * Partner with Sales to align scope, commercials, and assumptionsDelivery Alignment & Governance * Ensure clean handover from pre-sales to delivery teams * Define migration and modernization roadmaps (apps + data) * Identify architectural risks early and define mitigation strategies * Provide architectural oversight during early delivery phases * Mentor delivery teams on cloud and data best practicesRequired Skills & ExperienceGCP & Cloud Engineering * Deep hands-on experience with core GCP services * Strong knowledge of Kubernetes (GKE), microservices, CI/CD, and IaC (Terraform) * Expertise in cloud networking and security designData Engineering & Analytics * Strong experience designing enterprise-scale data platforms * Expertise in BigQuery architecture, performance tuning, and cost optimization * Experience with batch and streaming pipelines * Understanding of data governance, compliance, and data quality frameworksArchitecture & Consulting * Proven experience in enterprise solutioning and pre-sales architecture * Strong understanding of data and application modernization patterns * Ability to balance technical depth with business and commercial realitiesStakeholder Communication * Strong whiteboarding, storytelling, and executive communication skills * Ability to explain complex data architectures to non-technical stakeholders * Excellent documentation and proposal-writing skillsCertifications (Preferred) * Google Professional Cloud Architect * Google Professional Data Engineer * Google Professional Cloud Security Engineer * Kubernetes / DevOps certifications (plus)Nice to Have * Experience working with Google partner ecosystem and Google field teams * Exposure to regulated industries (BFSI, Healthcare, Public Sector) * Experience with AI/ML platforms, MLOps, and GenAI data foundationsSuccess Metrics * Win rate and deal value for cloud + data-led opportunities * Customer confidence in proposed cloud and data architectures * Minimal architecture rework during delivery * Strong alignment between data strategy, cloud platform, and business outcomesShow more Show less
title: GCP Architect

job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELNot ApplicableEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONEngineering and Information TechnologyINDUSTRIESAirlines and Aviation
job_description: Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airlinethat’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry bytransforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub – a digitallynative airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100 destinations.About The RoleAre you ready to lead the architecture and design of a secure, scalable, andsustainable data ecosystem using Microsoft Fabric, AKS, and robust governanceframeworks?This role will shape unified Guest 360 profile solutions by integrating diversedata sources and leveraging graph databases to unlock customer insights anddrive innovation.You will drive compliance with data privacy regulations, advocate for top tierdata management practices, and provide strategic leadership across solutiondelivery, platform optimization, and enterprise wide data initiatives.Embedded within the Enterprise Architecture and Technology Strategy function,this role will align data architecture strategy with business priorities,digital transformation, and regulatory requirements to support agile decisionmaking.Be part of the team shaping aviation through data informed insights andarchitectural excellence.About YouDegree qualified with a minimum of 10 years of experience in Enterprise DataArchitecture.Deep knowledge in relational databases (e.g. PostgreSQL, Oracle), No-SQL DB(MongoDB) and Graph databases (e.g. Neo4j)Good understanding of change data capture process and tools.Certifications in leading cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google CloudPlatform (GCP), along with expertise in Kubernetes and integration tools, arehighly desirable. Familiarity with architecture frameworks like TOGAF and SAFeis also preferred.Proven track record in delivering customer profile management and Master DataManagement (MDM) solutions at scale.Good knowledge and experience in AI/ML and Agentic AI is desired.We’d love to hear from you even more if you have hands-on experience with datagovernance frameworks, metadata management, data cataloguing tools and AI/MLThis is your opportunity to shape the future of air travel. Bring your best andshow us why you can own this position within Riyadh Air .Please submit your application by clicking on the Apply button. Our TalentAcquisition team will be reviewing applications shortly.Show more Show less
title: Enterprise Data Architect

extracted_jd.title: Enterprise Data Architect
responsibilities: Lead the architecture and design of a secure, scalable, and sustainable data ecosystem
Shape unified Guest 360 profile solutions by integrating diverse data sources
Leverage graph databases to unlock customer insights and drive innovation
Drive compliance with data privacy regulations
Advocate for top tier data management practices
Provide strategic leadership across solution delivery and platform optimization
Align data architecture strategy with business priorities, digital transformation, and regulatory requirements
Support agile decision making through data informed insights
qualifications: Degree qualified with minimum 10 years of experience in Enterprise Data Architecture
Deep knowledge in relational databases (PostgreSQL, Oracle)
Deep knowledge in No-SQL DB (MongoDB) and Graph databases (Neo4j)
Good understanding of change data capture process and tools
Proven track record in delivering customer profile management and Master Data Management (MDM) solutions at scale
nice_to_haves: Certifications in leading cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
Expertise in Kubernetes and integration tools
Familiarity with architecture frameworks like TOGAF and SAFe
Knowledge and experience in AI/ML and Agentic AI
Hands-on experience with data governance frameworks
Experience with metadata management and data cataloguing tools
implied_pain_points: Fragmented customer data across multiple systems lacking unified Guest 360 view
Need for scalable data infrastructure for new airline operations
Data privacy and regulatory compliance challenges in aviation
Lack of mature data governance and management practices
Difficulty unlocking customer insights from diverse data sources
success_metrics: Successful delivery of unified Guest 360 profile solution
Implementation of secure, scalable data ecosystem on Microsoft Fabric
Achievement of data privacy regulation compliance
Establishment of enterprise-wide data governance framework
Integration of diverse data sources enabling customer insights
Alignment of data architecture with digital transformation goals

ideal_candidate_profile.identity_statement: A senior data architect who thrives on building enterprise-scale data ecosystems from the ground up, combining deep technical expertise in modern data platforms with strategic vision to align data architecture with business transformation in a greenfield environment.
key_traits: Systems thinker who designs for scale and sustainability
Deep expertise across relational, NoSQL, and graph database paradigms
Governance-minded with strong regulatory compliance awareness
Strategic advisor who aligns data architecture with business priorities
ideal_candidate_profile.experience_profile: 10+ years in Enterprise Data Architecture with proven MDM and Customer 360 delivery

job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELMid-Senior levelEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONInformation TechnologyINDUSTRIESIT Services and IT Consulting
job_description: Role - Senior Technology ArchitectTechnology – Digital Architecture, Cloud, AI/ML/GenAI, Data Platforms,Integration, Middleware, DevSecOps, Enterprise Architecture.Location – Saudi ArabiaCompensation – Competitive (including bonus)Job DescriptionThe Senior Technology Architect will be responsible for developing digitalreference architecture, solution architecture, technology standards, andreusable architecture patterns. The role partners with IT and businessstakeholders across the value chain to create measurable business value. TheSenior Technology Architect will create, maintain, and continuously update theenterprise blueprint for design and architecture, and lead the execution andimplementation of digital platforms.This role requires strong competencies in understanding business objectives,outcomes, value streams, capabilities, and processes and mapping them into anintegrated portfolio of digital solutions. The Senior Technology Architectensures architectural decisions are aligned with business strategies and supportscalable and sustainable solutions.The Senior Technology Architect will also provide guidance on best practices,modern architectural approaches, emerging digital technologies, and evolvingindustry trends. The role collaborates with stakeholders to define future statearchitecture while maintaining oversight of current platforms, technologies, andarchitectural standards.Your role * Develop digital reference architectures, solution architectures, standards, and patterns that guide enterprise-wide digital transformation. * Partner with business and IT stakeholders to understand strategic objectives and translate them into scalable and integrated architectural designs. * Lead digital platform execution across multiple domains such as AI/ML/GenAI, data platforms, integration, and cloud. * Conduct architecture governance reviews and ensure alignment of project solutions with enterprise architecture direction. * Develop architecture artefacts including blueprints, conceptual designs, solution designs, integration architectures, and security considerations. * Evaluate new technologies, platforms, and solutions through POCs and technical assessments. * Define architecture roadmaps, future-state architectures, and modernization strategies. * Lead major transformation programs, ensuring alignment with architecture frameworks, standards, and design best practices. * Provide leadership and guidance to delivery teams, project squads, and cross-functional groups during solution implementation. * Communicate architectural proposals and decisions to senior management and stakeholders. * Drive the adoption of emerging technologies and act as a coach for modern digital engineering and architecture practices Required * 15+ years of experience across enterprise architecture, solution design, application development, cloud platforms, middleware, integration, and data technologies. * Strong hands-on experience with digital technologies including AI/ML/GenAI, IoT, blockchain, data analytics, cloud computing, enterprise integration, and database technologies (relational and time-series). * Proven experience designing solutions for cloud-native enterprise applications across AWS, Azure, GCP, OpenShift, or hybrid cloud environments. * Deep knowledge of architectural modes including microservices, headless architectures, event-driven architectures, and modern integration patterns. * Strong understanding of data domain concepts such as Data Lakehouse, Medallion Architecture, Data Fabric, Data Mesh, Data Virtualization, Data Governance, Privacy, and Marketplace. * Experience in AI/ML/GenAI implementation including fine-tuning, RAG, RAFT, agentic workflows, knowledge graphs, and frameworks like LangChain, Crew.ai, and LangGraph. * Ability to define architecture runways and provide day-to-day technical leadership to delivery teams. * Experience with architecture frameworks, review boards, governance processes, and stakeholder management. * Excellent communication, documentation, and presentation skills. * Understanding of regulations, compliance, and enterprise security considerations. Preferred * TOGAF, Open Group Open Certified Architect (Open CA), or similar architecture certifications. * Certifications in DAMA, DCAM, IBM Data Science, Vertex.ai, or other AI/ML/GenAI specializations. * Implementation experience with platforms such as Cloudera, Denodo, Informatica MDM, Informatica AXON, or data marketplaces. * Demonstrated ability to evaluate new digital technologies and lead POCs. * Experience building global digital platforms and large-scale transformation initiatives. * Strong product mindset and entrepreneurial approach to solution design. PersonalBesides the professional qualifications of the candidates, we place greatimportance in addition to various forms personality profile. These include: * High analytical skills * A high degree of initiative and flexibility * High customer orientation * High quality awareness * Excellent verbal and written communication skills About InfosysInfosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting.We enable clients in 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation. Withover three decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of globalenterprises, we expertly steer our clients through the many next of theirdigital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered corethat helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business withagile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance andcustomer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuousimprovement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise andideas from our innovation ecosystem.Visit www.infosys.com to see how Infosys can help your enterprise navigate yournext.All aspects of employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence andperformance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusiveenvironment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunityemployerShow more Show less
title: Enterprise Architect - Saudi Arabia

job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELDirectorEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONEngineering and Information TechnologyINDUSTRIESTechnology, Information and Internet
job_description: About AgodaAt Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when twolifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launchedAgoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team ofover 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around theglobe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with ourgreat deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, andexperiences worldwide.No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of ourculture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin yourbest journey and help build travel for the world, join us.Get to Know our Team: The Infrastructure Team operates all networks, servers, and storage platformsused to deliver services to Agoda’s customers. We support every product withinthe company, working with a wide range of systems and technology stacks. As partof our team, you will be working on a mission critical private cloud with over800k cores, spread over hundreds of Kubernetes clusters, OpenStack virtualmachines and bare metal servers.Each of these opportunities - coupled with an open work environment - are agreat way to gain experience on a modern and dynamic platform, constantlyevolving to adapt to changes in the business landscape.The Opportunity:Our Compute Platform team in Bangkok is looking for an experienced EngineeringManager to help scale and evolve our Compute Platform, with a strong focus oninventory, platform tooling, and lifecycle management across bare‑metalinfrastructure, virtual machines, and Kubernetes.You’ll balance hands‑on technical leadership with people leadership, guiding asmall, cross‑functional team while ensuring our platform delivers reliable,high‑quality data and tooling that supports informed decision‑making at scale.In This Role, You Will: * Stay hands‑on by contributing to system design and code, performing reviews, and providing expert technical guidance and mentorship to engineers at all levels, including interns and junior contractors. * Build, lead, and develop a cross‑functional team of software and systems engineers, supported by contractors and interns, operating with agile delivery practices. * Drive the research, design, and delivery of inventory and compute platform tooling that improves visibility, efficiency, reliability, and lifecycle management. * Own and support design reviews within the team and across the wider engineering organization, helping shape platform standards and technical direction. * Own the roadmap, and be accountable for delivery, reliability, and operational outcomes * Foster a culture of operational excellence, engineering quality, and continuous improvement. * Continuously learn and explore emerging technologies, proactively sharing knowledge and raising the technical bar across teams. What You’ll Need to Succeed: * 3+ years of experience as an Engineering Manager, leading, coaching, and developing engineers with a mix of seniority and experience levels. * Strong hands‑on coding experience in a modern programming language; Golang is preferred as it is our primary language. * Experience building or supporting platform tooling for large‑scale compute or infrastructure environments, with an understanding of Kubernetes, OpenStack, virtual machines, and containers. * Proven experience with platform stability, resilience, and observability. * A strong focus on testing, quality, and delivery, with experience in modern CI/CD environments. * A data‑driven, scientific approach to decision‑making, particularly around platform health, delivery outcomes, and performance. * Comfort operating with high autonomy at the team level, including setting OKRs/KPIs, prioritizing work, and taking clear ownership. * Experience leading Agile/Scrum teams with multiple direct reports. * Demonstrated experience using Generative AI tools in day‑to‑day engineering and management workflows (e.g. coding, design, documentation, analysis). * Self‑motivated, approachable, and adaptable, with strong communication skills; English is the working language. It’s Great if you Have: * Experience designing or building asset and inventory management systems at scale. * Hands‑on experience with configuration management and automation tools, preferably Ansible and/or AWX. * Solid understanding of networking fundamentals and protocols in large‑scale infrastructure environments. * Ability to communicate and collaborate effectively across teams and levels within a large organization. * Experience using, maintaining, or contributing to open‑source projects. * Experience integrating GenAI capabilities into platforms, such as MCP‑based or similar GenAI tooling. #telaviv #jerusalem #IT #ENG #4 #sanfrancisco #sanjose #losangeles #sandiego#oakland #denver #miami #orlando #atlanta #chicago #boston #detroit #newyork#portland #philadelphia #dallas If you’re ready to begin yourbest journey and help build travel for the world, join us.Get to Know our Team: The Infrastructure Team operates all networks, servers, and storage platformsused to deliver services to Agoda’s customers. We support every product withinthe company, working with a wide range of systems and technology stacks. As partof our team, you will be working on a mission critical private cloud with over800k cores, spread over hundreds of Kubernetes clusters, OpenStack virtualmachines and bare metal servers.Each of these opportunities - coupled with an open work environment - are agreat way to gain experience on a modern and dynamic platform, constantlyevolving to adapt to changes in the business landscape.The Opportunity:Our Compute Platform team in Bangkok is looking for an experienced EngineeringManager to help scale and evolve our Compute Platform, with a strong focus oninventory, platform tooling, and lifecycle management across bare‑metalinfrastructure, virtual machines, and Kubernetes.You’ll balance hands‑on technical leadership with people leadership, guiding asmall, cross‑functional team while ensuring our platform delivers reliable,high‑quality data and tooling that supports informed decision‑making at scale.In This Role, You Will: * Stay hands‑on by contributing to system design and code, performing reviews, and providing expert technical guidance and mentorship to engineers at all levels, including interns and junior contractors. * Build, lead, and develop a cross‑functional team of software and systems engineers, supported by contractors and interns, operating with agile delivery practices. * Drive the research, design, and delivery of inventory and compute platform tooling that improves visibility, efficiency, reliability, and lifecycle management. * Own and support design reviews within the team and across the wider engineering organization, helping shape platform standards and technical direction. * Own the roadmap, and be accountable for delivery, reliability, and operational outcomes * Foster a culture of operational excellence, engineering quality, and continuous improvement. * Continuously learn and explore emerging technologies, proactively sharing knowledge and raising the technical bar across teams. What You’ll Need to Succeed: * 3+ years of experience as an Engineering Manager, leading, coaching, and developing engineers with a mix of seniority and experience levels. * Strong hands‑on coding experience in a modern programming language; Golang is preferred as it is our primary language. * Experience building or supporting platform tooling for large‑scale compute or infrastructure environments, with an understanding of Kubernetes, OpenStack, virtual machines, and containers. * Proven experience with platform stability, resilience, and observability. * A strong focus on testing, quality, and delivery, with experience in modern CI/CD environments. * A data‑driven, scientific approach to decision‑making, particularly around platform health, delivery outcomes, and performance. * Comfort operating with high autonomy at the team level, including setting OKRs/KPIs, prioritizing work, and taking clear ownership. * Experience leading Agile/Scrum teams with multiple direct reports. * Demonstrated experience using Generative AI tools in day‑to‑day engineering and management workflows (e.g. coding, design, documentation, analysis). * Self‑motivated, approachable, and adaptable, with strong communication skills; English is the working language. It’s Great if you Have: * Experience designing or building asset and inventory management systems at scale. * Hands‑on experience with configuration management and automation tools, preferably Ansible and/or AWX. * Solid understanding of networking fundamentals and protocols in large‑scale infrastructure environments. * Ability to communicate and collaborate effectively across teams and levels within a large organization. * Experience using, maintaining, or contributing to open‑source projects. * Experience integrating GenAI capabilities into platforms, such as MCP‑based or similar GenAI title: [ITO] (Infra) Associate Engineering Manager / Engineering Manager –

job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELMid-Senior levelEMPLOYMENT TYPEContractJOB FUNCTIONEngineering and Information TechnologyINDUSTRIESTechnology, Information and Internet, Information Services, and IT Services andIT Consulting
job_description: ResponsibilitiesAbout the TeamJoin the innovative BytePlus team, the enterprise technology arm of ByteDance.This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to join the world's fastest-growingstartup and the biggest unicorn by valuation. With ByteDance's vision to buildglobal platforms of creation and interaction, BytePlus is devoted to developinginnovative technologies and products for businesses to fuel their next wave ofgrowth. It is the best time to join us and pave into the new era together!Responsibilities- Strategic Solution Design: Develop comprehensive technical solutions andreporting materials based on HiAgent’s capabilities; lead technical exchanges,product demonstrations, and POCs to guide customer approval and facilitatebusiness cooperation.- Industry Solution Incubation: Identify and create standardized AI Agentsolutions across different industry verticals, transforming successfullighthouse projects into scalable industry playbooks.- Requirement Engineering & Product Iteration: Act as the bridge between themarket and R&D by collecting and evaluating complex customer requirements todrive internal product innovation and platform iterations.- Bid Management & Sales Support: Partner with sales and industry architectsduring the bidding process to author technical documents, manage technicalpresentations, and ensure strong positioning in the marketplace.- Project Scoping & Delivery Handover: Author detailed Project WorkSpecifications (SOW) post-contract signing to ensure a seamless transition fromthe solution design phase to the implementation and delivery stage.QualificationsMinimum Qualifications- Bachelor’s degree or above in Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science,Engineering, Mathematics, or a related technical field.- Domain Experience: 3+ years of experience in enterprise-grade AI platforms, AIAgents, or LLM solutions, with a proven track record of delivering high-impact"lighthouse" projects.- Technical & Project Skills: Exceptional project management and organizationalskills, including the practical ability to independently configure and deployintelligent agent demonstration demos.- Language Proficiency: Mandarin or Arabic proficiency is highly advantageous.Mandarin is essential for deep collaboration with China-based product and R&Dteams; Arabic is required for effective communication with local businessstakeholders in the MEA region.- Mindset: A growth-oriented, results-driven professional who proactively adaptsto market shifts and takes independent action to solve complex problems.Preferred Qualifications- Platform Expertise: Prior experience in product solutioning or operations forAI platforms such as HiAgent, Coze, Dify, or n8n, or other leadingenterprise-level agentic workspaces.- Market Insight: Deep knowledge of the GenAI's market landscape, and anunderstanding of their strengths for specific enterprise use cases.- International Background: Candidates who possess a firsthand understanding ofinternational market dynamics and localized customer needs.Important Note: Please be advised that this job posting is on behalf of athird-party agency. This is a 12 months contract assignment managed by athird-party agency, who will be your employer. While you may be assigned to workat ByteDance, you will not be a ByteDance employee. All contractual terms,including payroll and benefits, will be handled by the third-party agency. Byapplying, you agree that the information provided in your application may beprocessed and retained by ByteDance for recruitment purposes and shared with thethird-party agency in accordance with ByteDance's Applicant Privacy Noticehttps://jobs.bytedance.com/en/legal/privacyAbout UsFounded in 2012, ByteDance's mission is to inspire creativity and enrich life.With a suite of more than a dozen products, including TikTok, Lemon8, CapCut andPico as well as platforms specific to the China market, including Toutiao,Douyin, and Xigua, ByteDance has made it easier and more fun for people toconnect with, consume, and create content.Why Join ByteDanceInspiring creativity is at the core of ByteDance's mission. Our innovativeproducts are built to help people authentically express themselves, discover andconnect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we createvalue for our communities, inspire creativity and enrich life - a mission wework towards every day.As ByteDancers, we strive to do great things with great people. We lead withcuriosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing techcompany. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, weachieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our Company, and our users. Whenwe create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.Diversity & InclusionByteDance is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valuedfor their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connectspeople from across the globe and so does our workplace. At ByteDance, ourmission is to inspire creativity and enrich life. To achieve that goal, we arecommitted to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment thatreflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hopeyou are too.Show more Show less
